title: Setting the Layout Mode
text: Setting the Layout Mode Use the following steps to configure the Layout Mode property in the IDE. Open your DSP in the Component Editor. Select the component (not individual fields or entities). In the Property Inspector, locate the Layout Mode property. Select the appropriate value from the dropdown. All DSPs default to Full Document mode (D) to ensure compatibility. The Layout Mode property can be changed as needed for your development approach. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
